title: The Sophia of Jesus Christ
source: Nag Hammadi Codex III; Berlin Codex
description: The risen Jesus teaches his disciples about the invisible God, the fall of Sophia, and the escape from the material world.
introduction: The risen Jesus teaches his disciples about the invisible God, the fall of Sophia, and the escape from the material world.

translation.text: The Lord said to them: 'I want you to know that all people born from the foundation of the world until now are dust.'
